zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Baldwin de Freville Fourth Baron Freville於1292年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾塔沃斯時，他的父親Alexander de Freville11289歲，母親Joan Cromwell29歲。他於1311年5月31日之前與Elizabeth Montfort在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1343年10月3日享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Freville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Préville): habitational name from (La) Préville, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Previl
meanings: alternatively, perhaps a shortened form of French Préville (see Preville ).
ornamental name composed of French pré ‘meadow’ and a shortened form of ville ‘settlement’ (see Vil ).

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In the Middle Ages it was a comparatively common name, which gave rise to a surname. It was borne by the Norman crusader Baldwin of Boulogne, who in 1100 was elected first king of Jerusalem, and by four further crusader kings of Jerusalem. It continued to be used by some families in England into the 17th century, but in modern times it normally represents a transferred use of the surname rather than a direct revival of the Norman given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Baldwin de Freville Fourth Baron Freville was born in 1292, in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Alexander de Freville, was 11289 and his mother, Joan Cromwell, was 29. He married Elizabeth Montfort before 31 May 1311, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 3 October 1343, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Baldwin de Freville Fourth Baron Freville est né en 1292, à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander de Freville, avait 11289 ans et sa mère, Joan Cromwell, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Montfort avant 31 mai 1311, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 3 octobre 1343, à l’âge de 51 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Baldwin de Freville Fourth Baron Freville(이)가 1292년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 타워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander de Freville(은)는 11289세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Cromwell(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1311년 5월 31일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1343년 10월 3일 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Baldwin de Freville Fourth Baron Freville родился в 1292 г. в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alexander de Freville было 11289 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Cromwell, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Montfort перед 31 май 1311 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 3 октября 1343 г. в возрасте 51 год.
